findings.context: Shares collapsed from €68.69 in Feb to €46.39 by year-end due to gas cutoff fears.

findings.details: EBIT fell by €890m despite 11% revenue growth.
findings.context: Global energy costs increased by €3.2bn, with natural gas alone driving 69% of the spike.

findings.details: Revenue rose to €87.3bn through aggressive price hikes.
findings.context: BASF successfully implemented double-digit price increases to offset raw material inflation.

findings.details: Reported a net loss due to €6.3bn non-cash impairment.
findings.context: The deconsolidation of Russian upstream assets forced a total write-off of their JV stakes.
